ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the company operates */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is traded */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the company's headquarters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock being tracked */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the date */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the date */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of shares traded on the date */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividend paid on the stock for the given date */,
  "split" REAL /* Stock split ratio on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moving_averages" (
  "ma_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moving average record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock being tracked */,
  "ma_type" TEXT /* Type of moving average (e.g., AWK-15ma, AWK-50ma) */,
  "ma_period" INTEGER /* Period for which the moving average is calculated */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the moving average record */,
  "moving_average" REAL /* Calculated moving average value */,
  "calculation_date" TEXT /* Date when the moving average was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ma_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moving_averages_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock to which the alert applies */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price increase, volume spike) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Price or volume threshold for triggering the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Current status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock for which the report was generated */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data included in the report in text format */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* Username of the user who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
